name: channel
description: Deliver a message to a human-visible channel and optionally receive replies. The raw transport layer for human communication — approval workflows, conversations, and other human-in-the-loop patterns build on top of this. Consumers provide the message text; the provider handles delivery and reply routing.

behavior.input: A message string to deliver to the human
behavior.output: Confirmation of delivery with channel details
behavior.deterministic: Delivery must succeed or return explicit failure. Never silently drop messages.
